understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, achieving a WIN condition to complete the entire game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement actions (MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT/UP/DOWN) shift the currently selected piece (P) by 3 pixels per cell, potentially pushing adjacent pushable blocks (B) if space allows, while walls (#) block movement variably; CLICK switches selection to another selectable piece (S) at the exact target_position coordinates without moving the current piece, and levels have a finite step budget where failed actions consume steps.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to progress through all levels of the KA59 puzzle game by placing every selectable piece onto a goal tile (+) simultaneously in each level, achieving a WIN condition to complete the entire game.
